name: Pat's Famous Meatballs for His Famous Pasta S
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 lb Ground chuck or lean beef
3 cups or more Italian bread crumbs
3/4 cup or more Grated Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large bowl, add all ingredients except the cheese.
The mixture will be very dry (this is good, as the crumbs will absorb any fats in the sauce!).
2. Mix well.
3. Add the cheese.
4. Form meatballs to the desired size and sauté all sides until just brown.
5. Drop the meatballs into the sauce you are making.
This recipe will make 24 +/- "larger than golf-ball size", or smaller, depending on your desires.
